object: Brand: Apple ; Model line: iPhone ; Model code or variant: iPhone 12 or iPhone 13 (6.1 inch OLED) ; Generation/Year: 2020-2022 ; Color/Finish: Black aluminum frame with rear glass ; Material: Aluminum + glass ; Visible markings: Apple logo on the back ; Distinguishing features: Flat-edge frame, Face ID notch, lightning port
problem_visual: Defect: Spider-web crack across the OLED front glass with localized impact point ; located at: Upper-center quadrant of the display ; severity: Major cosmetic + touch reliability risk ; visible signs: Multiple radiating cracks from a central point, glass shards lifted but not detached, display still appears to power on
estimated_skill_level: Intermediate — requires patience and tiny tools
safety_warnings: Power off the phone completely before opening
Disconnect the battery flex before any other internal work
Wear safety glasses — broken glass can flake off the display
Work on a clean, lit surface to keep track of tiny screws
